subcodes.first_line: O Sitarih! This is the Day of supreme joy, the Ocean of reunion surgeth, and the heaven of manifestation is upraised. Let the heart be prepared for recognition [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ستاره امروز روز فرح اکبر است بحر وصال مواج و سماء ظهور مرتفع قلب از برای معرفت
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement
